testcase.classname: components/Player reports playlist-low-coverage when remote archive coverage is incomplete
testcase.name: components/Player reports playlist-low-coverage when remote archive coverage is incomplete

testcase.classname: components/Player does not reschedule archive or force refresh for archived tracks on audio error
testcase.name: components/Player does not reschedule archive or force refresh for archived tracks on audio error

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting returns 400 when url query param is missing
testcase.name: pages/api/meting returns 400 when url query param is missing

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting returns cached data on repeated requests
testcase.name: pages/api/meting returns cached data on repeated requests

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting merges duplicate concurrent track requests into one upstream fetch
testcase.name: pages/api/meting merges duplicate concurrent track requests into one upstream fetch

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting retries retryable upstream failures and returns recovered track
testcase.name: pages/api/meting retries retryable upstream failures and returns recovered track

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting releases pending request after failure so the next request can refetch
testcase.name: pages/api/meting releases pending request after failure so the next request can refetch

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting prefers archived audio url from audio meta when track id matches
testcase.name: pages/api/meting prefers archived audio url from audio meta when track id matches

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting supports playlistId mode and preserves playlist order
testcase.name: pages/api/meting supports playlistId mode and preserves playlist order

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting merges archive playlist supplement tracks in playlist mode and deduplicates overlaps
testcase.name: pages/api/meting merges archive playlist supplement tracks in playlist mode and deduplicates overlaps

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting keeps non-ordered playlist tracks in original playlist order after ordered tracks
testcase.name: pages/api/meting keeps non-ordered playlist tracks in original playlist order after ordered tracks

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting globally sorts playlist tracks by PlaylistOrder before returning playlist mode results
testcase.name: pages/api/meting globally sorts playlist tracks by PlaylistOrder before returning playlist mode results

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting treats playlistOrder 0 as unordered and keeps it after explicitly ordered tracks
testcase.name: pages/api/meting treats playlistOrder 0 as unordered and keeps it after explicitly ordered tracks

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting enriches manual archive supplement tracks with AudioMeta fields by audioKey
testcase.name: pages/api/meting enriches manual archive supplement tracks with AudioMeta fields by audioKey

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting enriches manual archive supplement tracks with AudioMeta fields by explicit AudioKey
testcase.name: pages/api/meting enriches manual archive supplement tracks with AudioMeta fields by explicit AudioKey

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting matches archive playlist lyrics when AudioKey is extensionless and track url has extension
testcase.name: pages/api/meting matches archive playlist lyrics when AudioKey is extensionless and track url has extension

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting can disable archive playlist supplement tracks in playlist mode
testcase.name: pages/api/meting can disable archive playlist supplement tracks in playlist mode

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting falls back to playlist metadata when song detail fetch fails in playlist mode
testcase.name: pages/api/meting falls back to playlist metadata when song detail fetch fails in playlist mode

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting returns 404 when playlistId mode yields no tracks
testcase.name: pages/api/meting returns 404 when playlistId mode yields no tracks

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting sets provider debug headers when debug badge is enabled
testcase.name: pages/api/meting sets provider debug headers when debug badge is enabled

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting falls back to cached playlist data when playlist upstream request fails
testcase.name: pages/api/meting falls back to cached playlist data when playlist upstream request fails

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting retries playlist upstream failures and returns recovered playlist data
testcase.name: pages/api/meting retries playlist upstream failures and returns recovered playlist data

testcase.classname: pages/api/meting returns 502 when upstream fetch yields no valid tracks
testcase.name: pages/api/meting returns 502 when upstream fetch yields no valid tracks

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 405 for non-POST methods
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 405 for non-POST methods

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 400 when schedule target is missing
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 400 when schedule target is missing

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule accepts and executes a new archive job
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule accepts and executes a new archive job

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates repeated archive jobs within ttl window
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates repeated archive jobs within ttl window

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule returns failed job state when archive execution throws
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule returns failed job state when archive execution throws

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates failed jobs during exponential backoff window
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates failed jobs during exponential backoff window

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule allows retry after failed job backoff expires and blacklists after repeated failures
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule allows retry after failed job backoff expires and blacklists after repeated failures

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule supports stringified JSON body
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule supports stringified JSON body
